llm_response:
Subject: Urgent Request for Project Extension

Dear Professor Smith,

I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension for the upcoming data analysis project, which is currently due in two days. I sincerely apologize for reaching out with this request so close to the deadline, as I understand the importance of adhering to all academic timelines.

There are two primary reasons for my situation. First, I have encountered an unexpected technical issue with the software required for our regression modeling, which has significantly delayed my progress. Specifically, the dataset I was working with contained corrupted entries that prevented the algorithm from running correctly, forcing me to spend extra time cleaning the data manually. Second, a sudden family emergency has required my immediate attention, making it difficult to focus on my work during the necessary hours.

I have already completed the literature review and hypothesis formulation sections, and I am confident I can finish the remaining analysis within the next forty-eight hours if granted additional time. I am committed to submitting a high-quality report that meets all your expectations. Would it be possible to extend the deadline by two days? I am happy to provide any further documentation regarding my circumstances if needed. Thank you for your time and understanding.

Sincerely,

Jordan Lee
